articles.title: THIS UFC 327 CARD IS ABSOLUTE MADNESS! PROCHAZKA vs ULBERG PREVIEW
articles.description: Michael Bisping breaks down the absolutely stacked UFC 327 card in Miami, headlined by Jiří Procházka vs Carlos Ulberg in a massive light heavyweight title fight — with Procházka stepping in just days before the birth of his child — alongside Joshua Van vs Tatsuro Taira for the flyweight belt, Curtis Blaydes vs rising undefeated contender Josh Hooper, Paulo Costa vs Azamat Murzakanov, Dominick Reyes vs Johnny Walker and a loaded undercard featuring Kelvin Gastelum vs Vicente Luque, Tatiana Suarez vs Lupita Godinez, Kevin Holland vs Randy Brown, Mateusz Gamrot vs Esteban Ribovics, Cub Swanson vs Nate Landwehr and more — a full top-to-bottom breakdown of one of the wildest cards of the year. 🔒 Become a Member for special Perks, Exclusive Content and ultra-exclusive Live Chats: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDrG2_1TcVkXKXXsD6Kjwig/join ▶️ Follow Michael on Social: https://www.instagram.com/mikebisping https://www.twitter.com/bisping https://www.facebook.com/mikethecountbisping ▶️ Edited by John Brannigan: https://www.instagram.com/johnbranniganuk https://www.twitter.com/johnbranniganuk #bisping #ufc #mma #mixedmartialarts #michaelbisping #ufcnews #mmanews
